curation.synopsis: On the killing fields of Isstvan V, the Night Lords answer Horus's summons and march with the traitor primarchs against three loyalist Legions caught in the open. Apothecary Talos of the Tenth Company has fought beside his brothers Xarl, Cyrion, and the Exalted for so long that he can read the curl of his squadmates' helms before they speak — and tonight, with Konrad Curze stalking the battlefield in person, the dropsite slaughter pulls every dark inheritance of the VIII Legion to the surface. Through Talos's eyes the reader watches First Claw work the cooling pyres of Iron Hands and Raven Guard armour, trading black jokes over the dying, and grasping with growing certainty that whatever they call this — duty, vengeance, the Night Haunter's will — there is no going back from what they are about to become.
